name: Peanut Butter & Jelly Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup peanut butter cookies, crisp, finely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix all ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased springform pan.
4. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until set.
5. Let cool completely before serving.
